identity.project_summary: 96 ONCOSYS-Ova FF samples, 20mg, submitted to Markku Varjosalo lab for proteomics analysis.

document_index.name: 32_Project_log.docx
document_index.title: Project log
document_index.excerpt: Project is done in collaboration with Markku Varjosalo lab, Ada and Ziqi selected the samples - from SPACE and Ada’a CellCycle-IDS projects. Joonas selected and collected 10 PDS ascites supernatant samples for Varjosalo lab - 32_ascites_samples_sent_summer_2025 5 HRD and 5 HRP samples, highest tumor purities possible, low/no blood in ascites. Samples thawed, 100 µl aliquot taken to 2 ml Protein LoBind Tubes, Eppendorf, Cat.022431102 in CC hood, and refrozen in -80 in preparation for delivery on 30.6. Started: March 2025 - Anastasia submitted 20mg of 96xFF tissues for proteomics analysis, in 2 ml Protein LoBind Tubes, Eppendorf, Cat.022431102, provided by Markku.

vector_chunks.text:
Project log
Project is done in collaboration with Markku Varjosalo lab, Ada and Ziqi selected the samples - from SPACE and Ada’a CellCycle-IDS projects.
27.6.
Joonas selected and collected 10 PDS ascites supernatant samples for Varjosalo lab - 32_ascites_samples_sent_summer_2025
5 HRD and 5 HRP samples, highest tumor purities possible, low/no blood in ascites. Samples thawed, 100 µl aliquot taken to 2 ml Protein LoBind Tubes, Eppendorf, Cat.022431102 in CC hood, and refrozen in -80 in preparation for delivery on 30.6.
Started: March 2025 - Anastasia submitted 20mg of 96xFF tissues for proteomics analysis, in 2 ml Protein LoBind Tubes, Eppendorf, Cat.022431102, provided by Markku.
